description: Initial measurement: 30 synthetic + 15 realistic scenarios (synthesis), 36 temporal assertions. Chat extraction skipped (API not running).

Multi-session + abstention + anti-hallucination prompt. Improved multi_session 0.50->0.62 and hallucination 0.446->0.418, but hurt extraction 0.71->0.59 and knowledge_update 0.50->0.25. Too conservative.
Multi-session awareness only (no abstention). All metrics worse. LLM variance may dominate small prompt changes.
LLM-as-judge matching (Llama 8B). Recall halved 0.833->0.455. Judge too strict -- rejects valid matches.
